---
title: pyhocon
subtitle: python
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

```python
import pyhocon

# read

# read file as ConfigTree
config = pyhocon.ConfigFactory.parse_file(os.path.expanduser(path))
# convert ConfigTree to json string
config = pyhocon.HOCONConverter.to_json(config)
# convert json string to dict
config = json.loads(config)

# write

# convert dict to ConfigTree
config = pyhocon.ConfigFactory.from_dict(config)
# convert ConfigTree to string
config = pyhocon.HOCONConverter.convert(
    config,
    output_format='hocon',
    indent=2,
    compact=False
)
# write file
with open(path, 'w') as fh:
    fh.write(config)
```
